user_task_description: Clean the board packet PDF while preserving the live page text.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove visible Draft: prefixes, delete the draft cover page, restore the live pages to Cover, Management Summary, Working Pages, and Closing, and add bookmarks for each live page.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf packet that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

lines: management summary now reflects the final board packet language
